assertions.reason: A syntactically valid heartbeat callback with a garbage bearer token still returned HTTP 500 {"error":"misconfigured_callback_secret"} instead of HTTP 401.
CALLBACK_SIGNING_SECRET is still absent from the Convex deployment, so a valid heartbeat callback path cannot be exercised on the real API surface.

CALLBACK_SIGNING_SECRET is still absent from the Convex deployment, so a valid failure callback path cannot be exercised on the real API surface.
A real successful /execute-run round-trip still cannot be exercised because the callback receiver is misconfigured and the browser launch flow never produces a valid running study context.

frictions: Posting an empty JSON body to /api/run-progress now returns a 400 schema error before token validation; a syntactically valid event body is needed to reach the token-validation branch.
blockers: The Convex deployment still lacks CALLBACK_SIGNING_SECRET, which keeps valid callback-path and real execute-run round-trip testing blocked.
